headline: AT&T Tips Off March Madness Campaign To Reinforce Long Term Investor Story
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has launched a new national campaign tied to NCAA March Madness to focus on the fan experience. The company is introducing a new purpose driven spokesperson, Ted, as part of the campaign. The initiative connects AT&T’s brand and connectivity message to a high visibility sports event watched across the US. AT&T (NYSE:T) is a major US telecommunications provider with a focus on wireless, broadband, and business connectivity services. Sports and live events are an important arena...

headline: T Expands Service Assurance for SMBs: Will It Lift Prospects?
summary: AT&T's new small business guarantee adds bill credits and faster support, aiming to boost retention and ease downtime concerns in a competitive market.

headline: H2O.ai Opens Nominations for the 2026 AI 100 Awards, Honoring the Most Influential Leaders in Artificial Intelligence
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., March 17, 2026--H2O.ai, the leading Agentic AI company and a pioneer in Sovereign AI with secure, on-premise and air-gapped deployments, today announced that nominations are open for the 2026 H2O AI 100 Awards, recognizing 100 individuals worldwide who are shaping the future of artificial intelligence through innovation, leadership, and real-world impact.

headline: Circles' SaaS platform integrates Airwallex's embedded finance to help telcos launch digibanking services across 70+ countries
summary: Circles and Airwallex today announced a strategic global partnership to integrate Airwallex's industry-leading embedded finance solutions into CirclesX, Circles' award-winning SaaS platform for telecom operators. This partnership opens a significant new growth opportunity, enabling telecom operators globally to increase customer lifetime value by offering a full suite of digital banking services or digibanking solutions across 70+ countries.
